title: WireSegment
description: WireSegment: An object containing a collection of Wires to work within an MEP systems.

StartPoint.description: The point at which the Wire object begins. Point: Defines a dimensionless location in three-dimensional space.

EndPoint.description: The point at which the Wire object ends. Point: Defines a dimensionless location in three-dimensional space.

FlowRate.description: The amount of current being carried by the wire, the ampacity of the wire.

SectionProperty.description: Section property of the Wire, containing all material as well as profile geometry and dimensions, where applicable.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
